给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

你从下标 0 开始，目标是到达下标 `n - 1`。

在任何下标 `i` 处，你可以执行以下操作之一：

- **移动到相邻格子**：跳到下标 `i + 1` 或 `i - 1`，如果该下标在边界内。
- **质数传送**：如果 `nums[i]` 是一个**质数** `p`，你可以立即跳到任何满足 `nums[j] % p == 0` 的下标 `j` 处，且下标 `j != i` 。

返回到达下标 `n - 1` 所需的 **最少** 跳跃次数。

**质数** 是一个大于 1 的自然数，只有两个因子，1 和它本身。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,2,4,6]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 1 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 2` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到索引 `i = 3`，因为 `nums[3] = 6` 可以被 2 整除。

因此，答案是 2。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,3,4,7,9]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 `i = 1` 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 3` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到下标 `i = 4`，因为 `nums[4] = 9` 可以被 3 整除。

因此，答案是 2。

**示例 3:**

**输入:** nums = [4,6,5,8]

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

- 由于无法进行传送，我们通过 `0 → 1 → 2 → 3` 移动。因此，答案是 3。

 

**提示:**

- `1 <= n == nums.length <= 105`
- `1 <= nums[i] <= 106`

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if N =:= 1 -> 0;
       true ->
            PrimeMap = build_prime_map(Nums),
            Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
            Queue = queue:in({0, 0}, queue:new()),
            bfs(Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, Queue, N)
    end.

build_prime_map(Nums) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
        Num = lists:nth(I + 1, Nums),
        case is_prime(Num) of
            true ->
                lists:foldl(fun(J, Map) ->
                    JNum = lists:nth(J + 1, Nums),
                    case (JNum rem Num =:= 0) and (I =/= J) of
                        true -> maps:update_with(I, fun(L) -> [J | L] end, [J], Map);
                        false -> Map
                    end
                end, Acc, lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1));
            false -> Acc
        end
    end, maps:new(), lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1)).

is_prime(1) -> false;
is_prime(2) -> true;
is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(N) ->
    is_prime_helper(N, 2, trunc(math:sqrt(N)) + 1).

is_prime_helper(N, I, Max) when I > Max -> true;
is_prime_helper(N, I, Max) ->
    case N rem I =:= 0 of
        true -> false;
        false -> is_prime_helper(N, I + 1, Max)
    end.

bfs(Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, Queue, N) ->
    case queue:out(Queue) of
        {empty, _} -> -1;
        {{value, {Pos, Steps}}, Q} ->
            case Pos =:= N - 1 of
                true -> Steps;
                false ->
                    case array:get(Pos, Visited) of
                        true -> bfs(Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, Q, N);
                        false ->
                            NewVisited = array:set(Pos, true, Visited),
                            Adjacent = adjacent_moves(Pos, N),
                            Teleports = case maps:get(Pos, PrimeMap, []) of
                                [] -> [];
                                L -> L
                            end,
                            NewQ = lists:foldl(fun(Next, QAcc) ->
                                case array:get(Next, NewVisited) of
                                    false -> queue:in({Next, Steps + 1}, QAcc);
                                    true -> QAcc
                                end
                            end, Q, Adjacent ++ Teleports),
                            bfs(Nums, PrimeMap, NewVisited, NewQ, N)
                    end
            end
    end.

adjacent_moves(Pos, N) ->
    lists:filter(fun(X) -> X >= 0 andalso X < N end, [Pos - 1, Pos + 1]).
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if N =:= 1 -> 0;
       true ->
            PrimeMap = build_prime_map(Nums),

build_prime_map(Nums) ->
```

```erlang
is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(N) ->
    is_prime_helper(N, 2, trunc(math:sqrt(N)) + 1).

is_prime_helper(_, I, Limit) when I > Limit -> true;

    case N rem I =:= 0 of
        true -> false;
        false -> is_prime_helper(N, I + 1, Limit)
    end.

BFS(Nums, PrimeMap, N) ->
    Initial = 1,
    Target = N,
    Queue = queue:in({Initial, 0}, queue:new()),
    Visited = sets:add_element(Initial, sets:new()),
    bfs_loop(Queue, Visited, Nums, PrimeMap, Target).

bfs_loop(Queue, Visited, Nums, PrimeMap, Target) ->
    case queue:out(Queue) of
        {empty, _} -> -1;
        {{value, {Pos, Steps}}, Q} ->
            if Pos =:= Target -> Steps;
               true ->
                    Neighbors = get_neighbors(Pos, Nums, PrimeMap),
                    {NewQ, NewVisited} = lists:foldl(fun(Next, {QAcc, VAcc}) ->
                                                         case sets:is_element(Next, VAcc) of
                                                             true -> {QAcc, VAcc};
                                                             false ->
                                                                 NewQAcc = queue:in({Next, Steps + 1}, QAcc),
                                                                 NewVAcc = sets:add_element(Next, VAcc),
                                                                 {NewQAcc, NewVAcc}
                                                         end
                                                     end, {Q, Visited}, Neighbors),
                    bfs_loop(NewQ, NewVisited, Nums, PrimeMap, Target)
            end
    end.

get_neighbors(Pos, Nums, PrimeMap) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    Adjacent = case Pos of
                   1 -> [Pos + 1];
                   N -> [Pos - 1];
                   _ -> [Pos - 1, Pos + 1]
               end,
    Teleports = case maps:find(Pos, PrimeMap) of
                    {ok, L} -> L;
                    error -> []
                end,
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    PrimeMap = build_prime_map(Nums),
    Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
    Queue = [{0, 0}],
    bfs(Queue, Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, N).

build_prime_map(Nums) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
        Num = lists:nth(I + 1, Nums),
        case is_prime(Num) of
            true ->
                Indices = lists:foldl(fun(J, Acc1) ->
                    case lists:nth(J + 1, Nums) rem Num =:= 0 andalso J =/= I of
                        true -> [J | Acc1];
                        false -> Acc1
                    end
                end, [], lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1)),
                maps:put(I, Indices, Acc);
            false -> Acc
        end
    end, #{}, lists:seq(0, length(Nums) - 1)).

bfs([], _, _, _, _) -> -1;
bfs([{Pos, Steps} | Rest], Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, N) ->
    case Pos =:= N - 1 of
        true -> Steps;
        false ->
            case array:get(Pos, Visited) of
                true -> bfs(Rest, Nums, PrimeMap, Visited, N);
                false ->
                    NewVisited = array:set(Pos, true, Visited),
                    AdjMoves = [Pos + 1, Pos - 1],
                    ValidAdjMoves = lists:filter(fun(X) -> X >= 0 andalso X < N end, AdjMoves),
                    PrimeMoves = case maps:get(Pos, PrimeMap, []) of
                        [] -> [];
                        Indices -> Indices
                    end,
                    AllMoves = ValidAdjMoves ++ PrimeMoves,
                    NewQueue = Rest ++ [{Move, Steps + 1} || Move <- AllMoves],
                    bfs(NewQueue, Nums, PrimeMap, NewVisited, N)
            end
    end.

is_prime(1) -> false;
is_prime(2) -> true;
is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(N) ->
    MaxDivisor = trunc(math:sqrt(N)) + 1,
    is_prime_helper(N, 2, MaxDivisor).

is_prime_helper(_, Divisor, MaxDivisor) when Divisor > MaxDivisor -> true;
is_prime_helper(N, Divisor, MaxDivisor) ->
    case N rem Divisor =:= 0 of
        true -> false;
        false -> is_prime_helper(N, Divisor + 1, MaxDivisor)
    end.
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if N == 1 -> 0;
       true -> bfs(Nums, N)
    end.

bfs(Nums, N) ->
    Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
    Queue = queue:in({0, 0}, queue:new()),
    bfs_loop(Nums, N, Queue, Visited).

bfs_loop(Nums, N, Queue, Visited) ->
    case queue:out(Queue) of
        {empty, _} -> -1;
        {{value, {Pos, Steps}}, Q} ->
            case Pos =:= N - 1 of
                true -> Steps;
                false ->
                    case array:get(Pos, Visited) of
                        true -> bfs_loop(Nums, N, Q, Visited);
                        false ->

                                true -> enqueue_prime_jumps(Pos, Steps, Nums, N, NewQ, NewVisited);
                                false -> NewQ
                            end,
                            bfs_loop(Nums, N, NewQ2, NewVisited)
                    end
            end
    end.

enqueue_adjacent(Pos, Steps, N, Q, Visited) ->
    Adjacent = case Pos > 0 of
        true -> [Pos - 1];
        false -> []
    end ++ case Pos < N - 1 of
        true -> [Pos + 1];
        false -> []
    end,
    lists:foldl(fun(Adj, AccQ) ->
        case array:get(Adj, Visited) of
            false -> queue:in({Adj, Steps + 1}, AccQ);
            true -> AccQ
        end
    end, Q, Adjacent).

enqueue_prime_jumps(Pos, Steps, Nums, N, Q, Visited) ->
    P = lists:nth(Pos + 1, Nums),
    Indices = lists:seq(0, N - 1),
    Targets = lists:filter(fun(J) ->
        J =/= Pos andalso lists:nth(J + 1, Nums) rem P =:= 0
    end, Indices),
    lists:foldl(fun(J, AccQ) ->
        case array:get(J, Visited) of
            false -> queue:in({J, Steps + 1}, AccQ);
            true -> AccQ
        end
    end, Q, Targets).

is_prime(1) -> false;
is_prime(2) -> true;
is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(N) ->
    is_prime(N, 2).

is_prime(N, D) when D * D > N -> true;
is_prime(N, D) ->
    case N rem D =:= 0 of

    end.
```

```erlang
    if N == 1 -> 0;
```

```erlang
bfs(Nums, N) ->
    Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
    Queue = queue:in({0, 0}, queue:new()),
    bfs_loop(Nums, N, Queue, Visited).

bfs_loop(Nums, N, Queue, Visited) ->
    case queue:out(Queue) of
        {empty, _} -> -1; % Should not happen as per problem statement
        {{value, {Pos, Steps}}, Q} ->

               true ->

                        false ->

                            Adjacent = get_adjacent(Pos, N),
                            PrimeJumps = get_prime_jumps(Nums, Pos, N),

            end
    end.

get_adjacent(Pos, N) ->

                    end
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    if N == 1 -> 0;
       true ->
            PrimeIndices = build_prime_indices(Nums),
            BFS(N, Nums, PrimeIndices)
    end.

build_prime_indices(Nums) ->
    lists:foldl(fun
        (I, Acc) ->
            Num = lists:nth(I, Nums),
            case is_prime(Num) of
                true ->
                    P = Num,
                    lists:foldl(fun
                        (J, Acc1) ->
                            case J =/= I andalso lists:nth(J, Nums) rem P =:= 0 of
                                true -> maps:update_with(P, fun(Indices) -> [J | Indices] end, [J], Acc1);
                                false -> Acc1
                            end
                    end, Acc, lists:seq(1, length(Nums)));
                false -> Acc
            end
    end, maps:new(), lists:seq(1, length(Nums))).

is_prime(1) -> false;
is_prime(2) -> true;
is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(N) ->
    is_prime(N, 2, trunc(math:sqrt(N)) + 1).

is_prime(N, K, Limit) when K >= Limit -> true;
is_prime(N, K, Limit) ->
    if N rem K =:= 0 -> false;
       true -> is_prime(N, K + 1, Limit)
    end.

BFS(N, Nums, PrimeIndices) ->
    Visited = array:new([{size, N}, {default, false}]),
    Queue = queue:in({1, 0}, queue:new()),
    BFS(N, Nums, PrimeIndices, Queue, array:set(1, true, Visited)).

BFS(N, Nums, PrimeIndices, Queue, Visited) ->
    case queue:out(Queue) of
        {empty, _} -> -1;
        {{value, {Pos, Steps}}, NewQueue} ->
            if Pos == N -> Steps;
               true ->
                    CurrentNum = lists:nth(Pos, Nums),
                    NewVisited = array:set(Pos, true, Visited),
                    Adjacent = [Pos + 1, Pos - 1],
                    AdjacentMoves = lists:filter(fun
                        (AdjPos) ->
                            AdjPos >= 1 andalso AdjPos =< N andalso not array:get(AdjPos, NewVisited)
                    end, Adjacent),
                    AdjQueue = lists:foldl(fun
                        (AdjPos, Q) ->
                            queue:in({AdjPos, Steps + 1}, Q)
                    end, NewQueue, AdjacentMoves),
                    PrimeMoves = case is_prime(CurrentNum) of
                        true ->
                            case maps:get(CurrentNum, PrimeIndices, []) of
                                [] -> [];
                                Indices -> lists:filter(fun
                                    (J) -> not array:get(J, NewVisited)
                                end, Indices)
                            end;
                        false -> []
                    end,
                    PrimeQueue = lists:foldl(fun
                        (J, Q) ->
                            queue:in({J, Steps + 1}, Q)
                    end, AdjQueue, PrimeMoves),
                    BFS(N, Nums, PrimeIndices, PrimeQueue, lists:foldl(fun
                        (J, V) -> array:set(J, true, V)
                    end, NewVisited, PrimeMoves))
            end
    end.
```
